checks.message: Unsafe or non-runnable Verify command: rg 'use bevy::winit|use bevy::render|use bevy_egui' src/combat/api/ ; rg 'TwinCore|BatteryLoop|HolySupport|PredatorLoop|PrecisionMindGame|KitsuneGrace' src/combat/api/ ; rg 'pub fn validate_timeline_refs' src/combat/api/timeline.rs (contains shell control syntax such as pipes, redirects, semicolons, backticks, or command substitution)
